citation: Mereani, F. A. and Howe, J. M. (2018). Detecting Cross-Site Scripting Attacks Using Machine Learning. Advanced Machine Learning Technologies and Applications, AISC vol. 723, pp. 200-210. Springer.
Mereani, F. A. and Howe, J. M. (2018). Preventing Cross-Site Scripting Attacks by Combining Classifiers. Proceedings of IJCCI 2018, Vol 1, pp. 135-143. SciTePress.
caveat: Payloads are scraped URLs/query-strings from real XSS-vulnerable pages, not JSON API request bodies. Useful for testing generalization beyond synthetic_payloads.jsonl's templates, NOT a literal structural match to web_honeypot.py's payload format.
